2603.28371.title: Coherent Without Grounding, Grounded Without Success: Observability and Epistemic Failure
2603.28371.paper_summary: When an agent can articulate why something works, we typically take this as evidence of genuine understanding. This presupposes that effective action and correct explanation covary, and that coherent explanation reliably signals both. I argue that this assumption fails for contemporary Large Language Models (LLMs). I introduce what I call the Bidirectional Coherence Paradox: competence and grounding not only dissociate but invert across epistemic conditions. In low-observability domains, LLMs often act successfully while misidentifying the mechanisms that produce their success. In high-observability domains, they frequently generate explanations that accurately track observable causal structure yet fail to translate those diagnoses into effective intervention. In both cases, explanatory coherence remains intact, obscuring the underlying dissociation. Drawing on experiments in compiler optimization and hyperparameter tuning, I develop the Epistemic Triangle, a model of how priors, signals, and domain knowledge interact under varying observability. The results suggest that neither behavioral success nor explanatory accuracy alone suffices for attributing understanding. I argue that evaluating artificial epistemic agents requires a tripartite framework -- coherence, grounding, and a proper basing relation linking explanation to action. The systematic separation of knowing-that and knowing-how in LLMs thus challenges assumptions inherited from both epistemology and current AI evaluation practice.
2603.28371.paper_summary_zh: 當一個代理人能夠清楚表達為什麼某件事情有效時，我們通常將此視為真實理解的證據。這假設有效的行動和正確的解釋是共變的，且一致的解釋可靠地同時發出這兩者的信號。我主張這一假設對當代大型語言模型（LLMs）來說是失效的。我引入了我所稱的雙向一致性悖論：能力和基礎不僅是分離的，還在認識條件下反轉。在低可觀察性領域，LLMs經常成功行動，同時錯誤識別產生其成功的機制。在高可觀察性領域，它們經常生成準確跟蹤可觀察因果結構的解釋，但卻無法將這些診斷轉化為有效的干預。在這兩種情況下，解釋的一致性保持不變，掩蓋了潛在的分離。根據編譯器優化和超參數調整的實驗，我發展了認識三角形，這是一個模型，描述了在不同可觀察性下，先驗知識、信號和領域知識如何互動。結果表明，僅僅依賴行為成功或解釋準確性都不足以歸因於理解。我主張評估人工認識代理需要一個三部分框架——一致性、基礎和連結解釋與行動的適當基礎關係。因此，LLMs中知識的知道-那和知道-如何的系統性分離挑戰了從認識論和當前人工智慧評估實踐中繼承的假設。
2603.28371.author: Camilo Chacón Sartori et.al.
